testcase.name: test_split_payment_api_call_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:109: in test_split_payment_api_call_succeeds assert res.status_code == 200, f"Split sale failed: {res.status_code} - {res.text}" E AssertionError: Split sale failed: 400 - {"detail":"Cannot sell 'updated by cashier' at ₱10.00 — below capital ₱200.00"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
